productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Sweatshirt
description: Composition Black hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has full sleeves, a zippered closure, embroidered branding on left chest, two pockets on the side and a ribbed hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Warm iron This sweatshirt from united colors of benetton for women is the perfect piece for winter versatility. The zipper can be zipped till the hoodie or left unzipped up to the shoulders to form an exaggerated mock neck. Pair it with form fitting jeans, a colourful fitted tee and canvas shoes.
